commands: npm install -g ./pkg-a # Install pkg-a (creates link for npm-global-shared-cli)
cat $VP_HOME/bins/npm-global-shared-cli.json # BinConfig should point to pkg-a
npm install -g --force ./pkg-b # Install pkg-b with force (overwrites npm-global-shared-cli)
cat $VP_HOME/bins/npm-global-shared-cli.json # BinConfig should now point to pkg-b
npm-global-shared-cli # Should print pkg-b message (latest installed)
npm uninstall -g npm-global-shared-pkg-a # Uninstall pkg-a, should NOT remove the link (owned by pkg-b now)
npm-global-shared-cli # Should still work (owned by pkg-b)
npm uninstall -g npm-global-shared-pkg-b # Uninstall pkg-b, NOW should remove the link
